retrieved_result: Nesting IF Functions in Excel – Debra Dalgleish (May 30, 2013) The IF function lets you test something in Excel, and show one result if the test result is TRUE, and another result for FALSE. For example: =IF ( Debra met Excel MVPs last week , Show Picture , No Picture ) And yes, I did meet some Excel
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses Excel formulas, not integrated development environments or IDEs; not relevant to 'top IDEs for software development'.
